title: Anari
subTitle: Rama, a simpleton, is appointed as the bodyguard of Rajnandini, a rich girl. She soon falls in love with him but her brothers' violent nature gets in the way of her uniting with Rama.

title: Duniya
subTitle: An advocate, tasked with defending the brother of his love interest in court, grapples with a mounting challenge as incriminating evidence accumulates against his client.

title: Sitamgar
subTitle: Shankar carries the mental and physical scars of a cruel punishment he got as a young servant. Now, he comes upon a chance to avenge himself by holding to ransom a man who's related to his oppressors.

title: Anaconda
subTitle: A snake hunter offers his assistance to a documentary crew attempting to film an indigenous tribe in the Amazon. But as the journey progresses, his presence forces them to veer into dangerous waters.

title: Chacha Bhatija
subTitle: Teja, a widower, marries Sonia, a girl who only wants to get her hands on his inheritance. So, she creates animosity between Teja, his brother and his son.

title: Do Anjaane
subTitle: Amit is found on the railway tracks, mortally wounded and suffering from amnesia, after which a wealthy couple adopts him. However, six years later, he regains his memory after watching a film.

title: Yaarana
subTitle: Childhood friends Bishan and Kishan are separated by Bishan's uncle. However, Bishan helps Kishan to become a successful singer, and Kishan uses his skills to restore Bishan's lost fortune.

title: Raaj Tilak
subTitle: A king is cheated by his own men and his newborn son ends up in a gypsy camp. Several years later, when a substitute prince, Shamsher, inflicts atrocities on the royal family, the lost prince returns.

title: Mr. Natwarlal
subTitle: When Natwar's elder brother is framed for bribery, he decides to avenge his brother's humiliation and thus poses as a crime lord.

title: Ram Balram
subTitle: Unaware of his evil intentions and his role in killing their parents, two brothers Ram and Balram fall victim to their deceitful uncle. They must unite to foil his plans of gaining wealth.

title: Ram Balram
subTitle: Unaware of his evil intentions and his role in killing their parents, two brothers Ram and Balram fall victim to their deceitful uncle. They must unite to foil his plans of gaining wealth.

title: Chingaari
subTitle: A novice postmaster in Rangpur unexpectedly becomes entangled in the complex lives of local sex workers, challenging his preconceptions.

title: Comedy Station
subTitle: Various talented comedians perform hilarious skits and stand-up acts on diverse themes and topics to entertain the audience.

title: Bellbottom
subTitle: When a flight is hijacked by terrorists, Anshul, an undercover agent, sets out to rescue the passengers held hostage. However, he must overcome several challenges to be successful in his quest.

title: Prem Qaidi
subTitle: Harish, a poor boy, is sent to a reform school after he is falsely accused of killing his father by Kasturi Prasad, the father of his wealthy lover Neelima. Later, Neelima and Harish fight for love.

title: Naajayaz
subTitle: Jai and Sandhya pursue gangster Raj Solanki, but the case takes a shocking twist when Jai discovers Raj is his long-lost father.

title: Junoon
subTitle: Vikram is badly injured and his friend is killed by a cursed tiger. He soon learns that the curse has been passed onto him and he will turn into a tiger on a full moon night.

title: Aankhen
subTitle: Good-for-nothing brothers Munnu and Bunnu crack elaborate practical jokes, one of which gets out of hand. As a result, Bunnu goes missing and is presumed dead while Munnu is suspected of his murder.

title: Agni Sakshi
subTitle: Suraj Kapoor is a wealthy man who marries Shivangi and they both have a happy married life. Surprisingly, the couple gets approached by a man who claims that Shivangi is his wife, Madhu.

title: Hum Aapke Dil Mein Rehte Hain
subTitle: Love begins with a marriage of convenience and stays with Megha and Vijay in the throes of separation. In a classic case of unfortunate timing, one realises it too soon, while the other is too late.

title: Meri Biwi Ka Jawab Nahin
subTitle: Durga, a village girl and the wife of Inspector Ajay, fights against the injustices that women are subjected to. She fights for the truth and encounters many obstacles in the process.

title: Meri Biwi Ka Jawab Nahin
subTitle: Durga, a village girl and the wife of Inspector Ajay, fights against the injustices that women are subjected to. She fights for the truth and encounters many obstacles in the process.

title: Tejasvini
subTitle: Lala Khurana, a mafia leader, tries to quash the charges of molestation against his son and make him the CM. However, ASP Tejasvini is hell-bent on ending their tyranny and getting them convicted.

title: Movie
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.
